rationale.R1.1: The artifact has a minor issue with conceptual reconstruction as it excludes certain games from the evaluation without clear justification.
rationale.R1.2: The artifact has an argument-chain issue, specifically a non-sequitur, by claiming human-level play across all 12 Atari games despite excluding several games from the final evaluation.
